items.reviewerNotes: Claude high-risk approveExistingQid: ROW about lights when following a vehicle at night; closest master q0051 (following vehicle may use high beam) correct=Wrong -> No = B; option set on light-following behavior overlaps best.

Claude med-risk deleteQuestion: Same statement as claimed q0007 (mountain-road landslide caution, avoid stopping) — target-language duplicate of an already-localized batch-1 item.
Claude high-risk approveExistingQid: No master covers 'license not matching car type'; closest by matcher is q0981 (12 points) = Arabic A; weak overlap.

Claude med-risk approveExistingQid: Fuel-pump warning symbol (low fuel). ROW statement claims it means refill engine OIL = false. Image exact match q0542 (matcher #1, imageNN 0.889; same img as q1008 fuel/q0621). q0542 'add lubricating oil' correct=Wrong -> No=B.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Arabic specifies 'insurance label of another vehicle' (علامة التأمين) which matches q0248 (promptNN #1, cos 0.854) exactly over matcherTop's q0294 (license-plate variant); ROW correct=Right → Yes=A.

Claude med-risk approveExistingQid: Image: red triangle indicator = hazard-warning light. q0572 (matcher 70.3, imageNN 0.885) 'It flashes when turning on the hazard lights'. Arabic claims it lights 'when the car is in an accident' = false (it is manually-activated hazard light) -> No (B).

Claude high-risk approveExistingQid: Text ROW. Closest master q0323 (matcher 58.8, promptNN 0.739) = violating law/traffic-safety rules is a traffic violation (Right) -> Yes=A. AMBIGUOUS: Arabic adds 'merely... regulations ONLY' (فقط) qualifier that could flip intended answer to No; no master matches the restrictive framing. Picked closest = q0323.

Claude high-risk approveExistingQid: hasImage MCQ. Screenshot pixel-matches q0690 image (img_c95fe35): two white broken lines in red circles flanking central island. Series resolved by image (matcher's q0598 dashboard-symbol was wrong). AMBIGUOUS KEY: q0690 master correct='left-turn waiting areas' is NOT present in the Arabic option set; Arabic options appear to be q0690 distractors. Best-fit Arabic option = A (turning lines for small vehicles, = q0690 distractor 'small vehicles turning lines'). qid is certain by image; answer key flagged uncertain.

Claude high-risk approveExistingQid: AR 'on which type of road is overtaking not allowed' best matches q0407 (promptNN cos 0.924) 'On which kind of city road is a vehicle not allowed to overtake'. Master option set (main streets/one-way/heavy-traffic-flow/two one-way) does not cleanly align with AR (main roads/elevated/pedestrian-crossing roads/expressway around city) — localized option drift. Closest no-overtake AR answer is C 'طرق عبور المشاة' (pedestrian crossing roads). seriesCluster [q0406,q0386,q0417] are vehicle-type questions, not road-type; not applicable. Verify option mapping.

Claude low-risk approve: MCQ matches q0107 (driving through slightly flooded road with bicycles/pedestrians on both sides). matcher 60.6, best unclaimed. Correct 'reduce speed and go slowly' = Arabic C (تخفيض السرعة والقيادة ببطء).
